title: Pan-Seared Smoky Tofu with Guava Glaze
description: A sweet and savory stir-fry dish made with smoky tofu, roasted vegetables, and a hint of guava. Perfect for a gluten-free dinner option.

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables (such as broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the roasted vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the smoky tofu and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the guava jam, soy sauce, and rice vinegar. Pour the glaze over the tofu and vegetables and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
